dependencies: Scrap steel as primary raw material
Pelletized iron ore for DRI facilities
risks: Volatility in scrap steel prices and availability
Scrap export restrictions by foreign countries
Global sourcing of raw materials from politically unstable regions (Ukraine, Russia, Brazil)

regulatory_risks: Environmental compliance regulations (Clean Air Act, Clean Water Act, RCRA, CERCLA)
Greenhouse gas emissions regulations and climate change policies
Revisions to National Ambient Air Quality Standards (NAAQS)
Environmental Product Declaration (EPD) requirements (Buy Clean California Act, federal Buy Clean guidance)
Potential carbon policy mandates and legislation
Decarbonization of electricity generation impacting power costs and reliability
Trade remedies and tariffs (Section 232 steel tariffs, antidumping and countervailing duties)
Complex foreign tax laws and treaties

sanction_risks: Potential sanctions impacting raw material sourcing from politically unstable regions
Trade tensions with China affecting steel imports and overcapacity
